scripts.deploy: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote && wrangler deploy
scripts.format:all: npm run format && npm --prefix dashboard run format && npm --prefix .github/actions/report run format
scripts.format:all:check: npm run format:check && npm --prefix dashboard run format:check && npm --prefix .github/actions/report run format:check
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local --env dev
scripts.db:seed:local: wrangler d1 execute DB --local --file test/seed-local.sql --env dev
